raw_request: I want to understand workflows for going through documents and finding useful evidence.
intake_question: What type of work or workflow are you trying to understand?
markdown_packet_intent: Create a reader-first Markdown packet that includes direct evidence workflows and supporting document-processing building blocks.

recommendations.why_it_matters: It models how a reader turns messy documents into cited findings and unresolved questions.
recommendations.why_it_is_here: The request directly asks for document evidence review workflows.
recommendations.what_it_does: Inventories documents, extracts relevant facts, cites sources, and records uncertainty.

recommendations.why_it_matters: Classification is a useful building block before evidence review because it tells the agent what kind of document it is reading.
recommendations.why_it_is_here: The workflow supports evidence review even when it is not the final evidence packet workflow.
recommendations.what_it_does: Labels documents by type, confidence, missing fields, and extraction priority.
